_comment: faithdiff suppression list — GLOBAL translation boundaries only (symbols that
legitimately appear on one side of every routine). Routine-specific divergences
(a dropped PlayCry, a substituted helper) must stay visible: they are the report.
Each entry carries its why; --all-hits shows suppressed items.

calls.DelayFrame: port frame-pipeline plumbing (present/OAM-DMA per frame); pret's DelayFrame placement differs across the video boundary
calls.DumpBackbuffer: DEBUG_* harness dump hook, %ifdef-gated, not game logic
calls.hide_window: port window-compositor HAL boundary (GB hides the window via LCDC writes — TODO-HW)
calls.Bankswitch: GB ROM banking does not exist in the flat 32-bit port

stores.H_SCX: renderer scroll plumbing — pret writes rSCX via HRAM+ISR (TODO-HW boundary)
stores.H_SCY: renderer scroll plumbing — pret writes rSCY via HRAM+ISR (TODO-HW boundary)
stores.hLoadedROMBank: GB ROM banking does not exist in the port
